mnemonics: OPENMP = Open Multi-Processing. Think of it as opening multiple doors (threads) to process data faster
keyPoints: OpenMP uses compiler directives (#pragma) to parallelize code
It follows a fork-join model of parallel execution
Worksharing constructs like #pragma omp for distribute loops across threads
commonMistakes: Not protecting shared variables with critical sections, causing race conditions
Using too many threads leading to overhead instead of performance gains
